data.description:
## Context
ADR 0051 / bug 88eb landed FOREGROUND auto-gc on the tickets worktree (fixes the
detached-maintenance corruption). Measured safe on the current 184k-object store
(~1-2s routine, ~8-9s worst-case). But the git `gc` maintenance task does a FULL
repack whose cost scales with TOTAL store size, so the worst-case foreground pause
grows as the store grows, eventually approaching the 60s write-lock budget.

## Idea — strictly-better posture: bound each foreground maintenance run to O(new objects)
Replace the size-scaling `gc` task with git's incremental maintenance tasks, kept
foreground (serialized under the write lock, preserving the ADR 0051 safety):

- Disable the `gc` task (`maintenance.gc.enabled=false` / keep `gc.auto=0` semantics).
- Enable **`loose-objects`** — packs NEW loose objects into a fresh `loose-*.pack`
  (default batch 50k), and does NOT rewrite existing packs or the multi-pack-index.
- Enable **`incremental-repack`** — geometric, auto-sized batch capped at 2 GB
  (git commit a13e3d0), so a run "never" repacks the whole store in one shot.
- Optional (Gitaly's further win): pack loose objects into a fresh pack WITHOUT
  updating the MIDX (the residual O(size) cost), consolidate geometrically only
  occasionally.

## Prior art (see bug 88eb research)
- Microsoft Scalar: `gc.auto=0` + background `loose-objects`/`incremental-repack` via
  `git maintenance` (docs/advanced.md).
- GitLab/Gitaly: geometric repacking + time-based full repack + loose-object packing
  that never updates the MIDX (13s -> 174ms).
- git's own `git maintenance` "incremental" strategy: runs loose-objects +
  incremental-repack, never the gc task, and sets maintenance.auto=false.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The tickets worktree runs incremental maintenance (loose-objects +
  geometric incremental-repack), foreground, with the full `gc` task disabled.
- [ ] Measured foreground-maintenance pause stays bounded (~1-2s) as the store grows
  well past ~500k objects (proving command: the gc-latency measurement harness).
- [ ] No regression to the 88eb corruption fix (concurrency test stays green on git 2.54).
- [ ] Docs/ADR updated; ADR 0051's "escape hatch / scale-up" section points here.
data.title: Bound foreground git-maintenance to O(new objects): disable the gc task, use loose-objects + geometric incremental-repack
